visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with short black hair, wearing glasses, a gray flat cap, and a bright red t-shirt stands in front of a neutral-colored wall. He looks directly at the camera and gestures with his hands, displaying a beaded bracelet on his left wrist. The lighting is soft and even studio lighting. (2) A visual transition shows a complex miniature model of a theme park, featuring modern white buildings, lush green areas, and circular pathways. A stylized "PokéPark Kanto" logo with green text and a small leaf icon is superimposed over the center of the model. (3) A colorful cartoon map of the Kanto region in Japan appears, with specific areas like Inagi City and Kawasaki City marked. A green magnifying glass icon highlights a section of the map where the PokéPark logo is placed, indicating the location. (4) A sequence of 3D animated scenes featuring Pokémon in natural environments: a Sudowoodo among trees, a Pikachu in a close-up, and Oddish and Diglett in a grassy field. The lighting in these clips is bright and mimics natural sunlight. (5) A colorful concept art illustration is shown, depicting a bustling theme park filled with people and various Pokémon like Dragonite and Charizard. The scene is vibrant with high saturation, showing diverse park facilities and attractions under a clear sky. (6) The camera returns to the man in the red shirt and gray cap. He points toward the viewer with his right hand and continues talking with an expressive facial expression. The scene remains in the same indoor setting with soft studio lighting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: 3ctim. [Subtitle]: 這則內容. (2) [Subtitle]: 寶可夢官方. (3) [Slogan]: 全球首座. [Subtitle]: 正式宣布. (4) [Slogan]: 常設寶可夢. [Slogan]: PokéPark Kanto. (5) [Subtitle]: 將在2026年春天. (6) [Logo]: PokéPark Kanto. (7) [Subtitle]: 正式開幕. (8) [Subtitle]: 地點就在日本東京附近的. (9) [Subtitle]: 整個樂園. (10) [Slogan]: 關都地區. (11) [Subtitle]: 園區總共分成兩大主題區. (12) [Slogan]: 草紗鎮. [Slogan]: 寶可夢森林. (13) [Subtitle]: 園區裡有寶可夢中心. (14) [Subtitle]: 甚至還有對戰廣場. (15) [Subtitle]: 讓你彷彿變成真的訓練家一樣. (16) [Subtitle]: 滿滿沉浸式體驗. (17) [Subtitle]: 根本夢想成真. (18) [Subtitle]: 門票預售會從. (19) [Subtitle]: 今年秋天開始. (20) [Variety]: 你也是寶可夢迷嗎. [Logo]: Pokémon. (21) [Subtitle]: 你最想遇到哪隻寶可夢. (22) [Subtitle]: 我跟你講. (23) [Subtitle]: 我一定會去.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (Tim) presenting in front of the camera.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The man is wearing a red t-shirt, a gray patterned flat cap, and rectangular black-rimmed glasses. He has a beaded bracelet on his left wrist.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The primary background is a simple, blurred indoor wall. This alternates with a physical model of a park, a cartoon map of the Kanto region, 3D animated forest/field environments, and concept art of a theme park.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice with a clear, professional tone starts speaking at a moderate pitch. There is no background music or ambient noise, suggesting a quiet studio recording. The speech rate is natural with clear articulation. (2) A fast-paced, high-energy electronic background music track enters, featuring a rhythmic synth beat. The speaker's voice remains dominant, maintaining a high arousal level and positive valence. (3) A distinct digital "pop" sound effect occurs simultaneously with the appearance of text on the screen. The electronic BGM continues at a steady BPM as the narrator describes specific park features. (4) A "ding" bell sound effect is heard as a logo appears. The narrator's pitch variability increases to emphasize key points, while the background music maintains a consistent, upbeat tempo and major tonality. (5) A transition SFX, a subtle "whoosh," marks a change in visual context. The speaker's voice remains confident and authoritative. The BGM remains constant, providing an energetic bed for the narration. (6) A playful "ding" sound effect triggers as a cartoon hat graphic appears on the screen. The narrator asks a question with rising intonation. The music and narration cut out cleanly at the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Information Display -> Audience Engagement -> Commitment
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a news commentary and hype-building update regarding the official announcement of the new 'PokéPark Kanto' theme park in Japan. It aims to inform fans of the location, opening date, and features while encouraging engagement by asking about their favorite Pokémon.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high density of visual overlays and energetic editing common in short-form social media news reporting. The juxtaposition of a real presenter with animated assets creates an engaging, community-focused tone.
